verdict.label: Worth checking
verdict.headline: Rey Cortiço Lunch
verdict.reason: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for lunch, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide should let the sandbars work without overdoing it.

conversationalSummary.text: Alright Pedro—go for a camera check first for Rey Cortiço around lunch. Surfline’s only poor-to-fair on it and the wind angle doesn’t really suit, so it could turn sketchy and messy pretty quickly even if there’s a bit of size coming through. I’d check Surfline and the MEO Beachcam for Rey Cortiço first, and only leave if the sets look clearly more organized than expected.

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Rey Cortiço looks like a small north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 35 kJ, 11 s period, lully 3/100, and wind is the main risk.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small; 10-13s at mid tide also works on Belgas, but low tide is not a deal-breaker, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; wind angle is poor for this spot.
best.shortExplanation: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for lunch, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide should let the sandbars work without overdoing it.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot

ranked.explanation: Almagreira looks like a small north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 30 kJ, 6 s period, lully 2/100, and wind is the main risk.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered; 6-9s at mid tide can make exposed beaches like Belgas / Almagreira / Cerro / Meio da Baia sharp and rippable, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; wind angle is poor for this spot.
ranked.shortExplanation: Almagreira is worth a quick check for lunch, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide and timing are lining up well for this spot.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot

ranked.explanation: Lagide looks like a small window for Fun progression, Medium confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 23 kJ, 11 s period, lully 1/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small; 10-13s at mid tide suits the reef shelves and gives long workable walls.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; SwellMap rating 1/10 Poor — caution.
ranked.shortExplanation: Lagide is worth a quick check for lunch, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should be manageable, but not a big advantage.  The tide should help the reef hold shape.

wetsuit.reason: Warm water, warm air, and light wind make the 3/2 reasonable.

ranked.explanation: Supertubos looks like a small window for Worth checking, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 30 kJ, 6 s period, lully 1/100, and wind is the main risk.  A fast, hollow sand-bottom wave that gets serious quickly; this is best for short, punchy bodyboard barrels when it is small enough for comfort.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; wind angle is poor for this spot; 6-9s at mid tide stays weak and soft for Supertubos / Molhe Leste; SwellMap rating 1/10 Poor — caution.
ranked.shortExplanation: Supertubos is worth a quick check for lunch, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide is helping, but the spot still looks serious.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot
